spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Requests) AS Requests
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Requests) AS Requests
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND Dist LIKE 'w_C%'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Requests) AS Requests
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND Dist LIKE 'w_E%'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND startsWith(Dist, 'w_C')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND startsWith(Dist, 'w_E')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND startsWith(Dist, 'generated')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND startsWith(Dist, 'w_C')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND startsWith(Dist, 'w_E')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

WITH
  cutoff AS (
    SELECT (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR) AS cut
  ),
  per_hour AS (
    SELECT
      toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
      sum(Impressions) AS imps,
      sum(Requests)    AS reqs
    FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
    WHERE timestamp >= (SELECT cut FROM cutoff) - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
      AND timestamp <  (SELECT cut FROM cutoff)
    GROUP BY time
  ),
  per_hour_win_volume AS (
    SELECT
      time,
      imps,
      reqs,
      imps / nullIf(reqs, 0) AS winrate,
      imps * (imps / nullIf(reqs, 0)) AS weighted_win
    FROM per_hour
  )
SELECT
  time,
  weighted_win / sum(weighted_win) OVER () * 100 AS winrate_share_pct
FROM per_hour_win_volume
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Requests) AS Requests
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Requests) AS Requests
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
  AND startsWith(Dist, 'w_C')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Requests) AS Requests
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
  AND startsWith(Dist, 'w_E')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
  AND Dist LIKE '%_C_%'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
  AND Dist LIKE '%_E_%'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp + INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate_yesterday
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp + INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
  AND (timestamp + INTERVAL 24 HOUR) < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp + INTERVAL 72 HOUR) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate_72h
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp + INTERVAL 72 HOUR)
  AND (timestamp + INTERVAL 72 HOUR) < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp + INTERVAL 168 HOUR) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate_1w
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp + INTERVAL 168 HOUR)
  AND (timestamp + INTERVAL 168 HOUR) < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(ts_shifted) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions_last_month
FROM default.v_impressions_last_month_same_weekday
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts_shifted)
  AND toStartOfHour(ts_shifted) < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions_2mo_ago
FROM default.v_impressions_same_weekday_2mo_ago
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts_shifted)
  AND time < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions_3mo_ago
FROM default.v_impressions_same_weekday_3mo_ago
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts_shifted)
  AND time < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time,
  sum(Impressions) AS Impressions_3mo_ago
FROM default.v_impressions_same_weekday_3mo_ago
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts_shifted)
  AND time < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

spec.title: 90 Day Side by Side Hourly Impressions Month Compare

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate_now
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(ts_shifted) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate_1mo_ago
FROM default.v_winrate_same_weekday_1mo_ago
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts_shifted)
  AND toStartOfHour(ts_shifted) < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(ts_shifted) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate_2mo_ago
FROM default.v_winrate_same_weekday_2mo_ago
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts_shifted)
  AND toStartOfHour(ts_shifted) < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(ts_shifted) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate_3mo_ago
FROM default.v_winrate_same_weekday_3mo_ago
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts_shifted)
  AND toStartOfHour(ts_shifted) < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate_now
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND timestamp < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  toStartOfHour(ts_shifted) AS time,
  sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0) AS win_rate_3mo_ago
FROM default.v_winrate_same_weekday_3mo_ago
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts_shifted)
  AND toStartOfHour(ts_shifted) < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

spec.title: 90 Day Side by Side Hourly Win Rate Month Compare

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  (SELECT sum(wattage_Impressions)
   FROM default.hourly_last_72h_sums
   WHERE hour_bucket >= toStartOfDay(now())
     AND hour_bucket < toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
  /
  nullIf(
    (SELECT sum(wattage_Impressions)
     FROM default.hourly_last_72h_sums
     WHERE hour_bucket >= toStartOfDay(now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY)
       AND hour_bucket < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR) - INTERVAL 1 DAY),
    0
  ) AS performance_vs_yesterday;

/* MTD hour-of-day peak times (% of month-to-date weighted win volume), with 3h cutoff */
WITH
  cutoff AS (
    SELECT (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR) AS cut
  ),
  per_hour_of_day AS (
    SELECT
      toHour(timestamp) AS hod,
      sum(Impressions)  AS imps,
      sum(Requests)     AS reqs,
      (sum(Impressions) / nullIf(sum(Requests), 0)) AS winrate,
      /* weighted win volume = impressions (same as imps) */
      sum(Impressions) AS weighted_win
    FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
    WHERE timestamp >= toStartOfMonth((SELECT cut FROM cutoff))
      AND timestamp <  (SELECT cut FROM cutoff)
    GROUP BY hod
  )
SELECT
  toDateTime(concat(toString(toDate(now())), ' ', lpad(toString(hod), 2, '0'), ':00:00')) AS time,
  (weighted_win / sum(weighted_win) OVER ()) * 100 AS winrate_share_pct
FROM per_hour_of_day
ORDER BY hod;

SELECT
  (SELECT sum(wattage_Requests)
   FROM default.hourly_last_72h_sums
   WHERE hour_bucket >= toStartOfDay(now())
     AND hour_bucket < toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
  /
  nullIf(
    (SELECT sum(wattage_Requests)
     FROM default.hourly_last_72h_sums
     WHERE hour_bucket >= toStartOfDay(now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY)
       AND hour_bucket < (toStartOfHour(now()) - INTERVAL 3 HOUR) - INTERVAL 1 DAY),
    0
  ) AS performance_vs_yesterday;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) AS Impressions
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) AS Impressions
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND startsWith(Dist, 'w_C')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
    toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
    sum(Impressions) AS Impressions
FROM default.`26_ss_dist_reporting`
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND startsWith(Dist, 'w_E')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;
